observation.summary: Live staging evidence showed asn-000138 stopped at the same instant Desktop auto-updated the daemon to v0.0.56 while the daemon status surface already exposes running_tasks.

hypothesis.summary: Desktop daemon replacement must be deferred while status.running_tasks is greater than zero, otherwise auto-update can interrupt user-visible assignments.

execution.summary: Keep the daemon-side runtime-upgrade rule reserved and require a riido-desktop daemonLauncher verifier plus local QA evidence before claiming closure.

evaluation.summary: runtimeupgrade must continue to report the reserved rule, while loopevidence keeps root open_gap_count at zero so unresolved work cannot be used as closed self-improvement evidence.

retrospective.summary: The daemon repo owns the observed runtime contract and evidence requirement; riido-desktop must close the loop with launcher tests that prove active assignments survive update checks.

evidence.proves: daemon runtime-upgrade evidence exposes the active-assignment update deferral rule as reserved, not implemented
loop evidence records the candidate without introducing root open gaps that would break self-improvement closure
